summary: This is a high-quality test suite that comprehensively covers all requirements from the task description. Coverage is excellent: main/master→latest, PR→pr-{number}, semver tag→v{semver}, feature branch→{branch}-{sha}, and all sanitization rules (lowercase, underscore-to-hyphen, special char collapse, leading/trailing hyphen trim) are each given dedicated test cases. Error handling for missing required arguments and unknown flags is explicitly tested. Rigor is strong — boundary cases like PR#1, semver on a feature branch (ensuring no branch-sha tag leaks through), and various sanitization edge cases are all covered; the one minor gap is that semver tag + PR combination behavior isn't tested. Design is excellent: tests are independent (stateless `run` invocations), self-documenting names, grouped logically with clear comments marking TDD phases, and each test asserts the exact expected output string rather than fuzzy matching. The overall suite would reliably catch regressions across all documented behaviors.
